disambiguation_rules.the commission: Federal Election Commission - established through context of 52 U.S.C. 30109 amendments and regulatory authority
disambiguation_rules.commission: Federal Trade Commission - confirmed by explicit definition in section (4) of this definitions provision

parsing_rules: Definition sections in legislative text systematically define key regulatory terms (covered activity, covered foreign entity, country of concern, appropriate congressional committees). Extract all enumerated entities from such definitions, particularly country listings and committee memberships, as they represent explicit policy scope.

oddities.note: Section heading 'SEC. 2. TRANSPARENCY REQUIREMENTS' provided without substantive text content; only the section number and title are present in the supplied document excerpt, preventing entity extraction from the actual transparency requirements language.

Section 1 contains only the short title provision with no substantive content referencing entities. The document title 'Transparent Automated Governance Act' and acronym 'TAG Act' are present but appear to be metadata rather than entities extracted from legislative text. Known entities from earlier sections (section 3502 of title 44 United States Code, Congress, Office of Management and Budget) are not referenced in this section.

Document presents only bill introduction materials (title, referral, enacting clause) without substantive legislative sections. No entity-bearing regulatory or procedural language present in supplied text. Full bill text with substantive provisions not provided.
Section 5 titled 'REPORTS' appears in the provided text but contains no substantive content, preventing extraction of any entities from that section.
Section 3 title 'GUIDELINES TO FACILITATE DISTINGUISHING CONTENT GENERATED BY GENERATIVE ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE' is present but substantive content is not provided in the text supplied.
Text ends mid-entry at 'NATIONAL CRITICAL CAPABILI' (definition 5 truncated), indicating document was cut off during extraction.

The document title indicates AI classification prohibition, but the extracted text sections do not contain explicit language prohibiting AI entities from being classified as artists—only fund establishment and deposit procedures are detailed in the provided sections.

Federal Trade Commission - explicitly defined in section (2) of this definitions provision
Explicitly defined in SEC. 4(1) as Federal Trade Commission; context confirms FTC enforcement authority
Resolved to Federal Trade Commission via explicit definition in section (3) of definitions provision
Nuclear Regulatory Commission - explicitly defined in section (2) of this definitions provision
